chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No,D-845 0[ 2011 Date of hearing Order with signature of Juuge For orders on MA No.1985 of 2011, For katcha peshi, 21.12.2016. Mr Habibullah G Ghouri Advocate for Petitioner Mr, Asif Hussain Chandio, Advocate for Respondents No [0 3- Mr Nisar Ahmed Abro, DAG Mr Asif Hussain Chandio, learned counse for the Respondents No O1 to 03 submits that since 2011 appointment has been made by the respondents in son quota He further submits that as per office order dated 08.04.2004, 20% quota Of the posts in BPS- ٥1 t٥ 09 in all categories is reserved for the children of WAPDA employees and the recruitment against quota will be made on contract basis as and when posts are avallable b the following order of merit He therefore, undertakes that case of petitioner for the appointment in Power Generation Company shall be considered by the Respondents in children quota as per rules VIeW above slatement learned counsel f0٢ the Respondents No 1 to 3, learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of this petition Order accordingly Petition stands disposed off ٥ ٧ ٧ G ٤ ٥ ٧ G ٤ 0أ58
